---
title: "EV market Analysis Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    theme: cosmo
jupyter: python3
author: Sanodya Jinadasa
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
from IPython.display import Markdown

df = pd.read_csv("ev_market_2026.csv")

```



# Overview

## Row
```{python}
df.head(5)
```



### Column
```{python}
#| echo: false
total_ev = df.shape[0]

f"""
<div style="
    background:#e3f2fd;
    padding:15px;
    border-radius:10px;
    text-align:center;">
    <h4>Total Vehicles</h4>
    <h2>{total_ev}</h2>
</div>
"""
```

### Column
```{python}
#| echo: false
avg_price = round(df["price_usd"].mean(), 0).item()

Markdown(f"""
<div style="background:#e8f5e9; padding:15px; border-radius:10px; text-align:center;">
    <h4 style="margin:0;">Avg Price ($)</h4>
    <h2 style="margin:5px 0 0 0;">{avg_price:,.0f}</h2>
</div>
""")
```


### Column
```{python}
#| echo: false
range=int(round(df["range_miles"].mean(), 0).item())
f"""
<div style="
    background:#fff3e0;
    padding:15px;
    border-radius:10px;
    text-align:center;">
    <h4>Total Sales</h4>
    <h2>{range:,}</h2>
</div>
"""
```

### Column
```{python}
#| echo: false
total_sales = int(df["annual_sales_units"].sum())

f"""
<div style="
    background:#fff3e0;
    padding:15px;
    border-radius:10px;
    text-align:center;">
    <h4>Total Sales</h4>
    <h2>{total_sales:,}</h2>
</div>
"""
```





# Market & Brand Insights

# Performance vs Price

# Customer & Value Analysis

# Trends
